title: CobblemonMoreCosmetics
description: More Pokémon and trainer cosmetics for Cobblemon!
body:
## 💬 **Introduction**

CobblemonMoreCosmetics(CMC) is a Cobblemon addon dedicated to providing more cosmetic variants for Pokémon and cosmetic items for trainers within the Cobblemon mod! You can equip cosmetics through putting certain items in the cosmetic slot of certain Pokémon (listed below), and you can currently only obtain trainer cosmetics such as hats and weapons through commands. 

CMC provides custom cosmetics that are easily accessible with Vanilla/Cobblemon items, and provide both client and server side support, making it adequate for both singleplayer and multiplayer worlds. If you want high-quality cosmetics, this addon is your best pick. If you have any suggestions, post on the Discord! CMC will be consistently updated.

## 💻 **How to Install:**

Put your MoreCosmetics version into the datapacks folder of your desired world and into your resourcepacks folder of the instance. Make sure that cosmetic packs are loaded at the top. Be sure to activate the resource pack in the Resource Pack menu! Have fun, and enjoy!

**DEPENDENCIES**

Cobblemon: Required
Cobblemon: Armory: Optional, required for armors

**RECIPE PACKS**

As of CMC Release 1.1.2, the Recipe Pack is available to download as an optional supplementary pack in the versions page, just plop it in the same datapacks folder as the primary pack and you should be fine!

## 📃 **Features**

- Custom Cosmetics for Cobblemon
  - Accessed through Vanilla/Cobblemon items
  - Detailed texturing and modeling
  - Exclusive animations for certain Pokémon
  - Now with Pokédex support!
- Trainer Cosmetics for your player character
  - Currently hats only, but more are planned!
  - Only obtainable through commands currently without the recipe pack
- For specific commands and the latest documentation, be sure to check the README.md in the pack!

<details>
<summary>List of Available Pokémon Cosmetics</summary>
  
Use the items listed beside the Pokémon to let them wear the cosmetic:

- Steampunk Style Articuno - Copper Ingot
- Magma Style Blaziken - Magma Block
- Royal Style Carbink - King's Rock
- Mega Greninja Style Ceruledge - Mystic Water
- Knight Style Charizard - Iron Helmet
- Ancient Style Cyclizar - Red Wool
- Ninja Style Decidueye - Blue Wool
- New Year Style Drampa - Lantern
- Legend Style Grumpig - Potato
- Reaper Style Haxorus - Skeleton Skull
- Fighter Style Latios - Iron Ingot
- Covert Style Lucario - Covert Cloak
- Racer Style Magcargo - Iron Helmet
- Dark Magician Style Meowscarada - Dusk Stone
- Covert Style Mewtwo - Covert Cloak
- Pawmi Style Mimikyu - Orange Wool
- Cheerleader Style Minun - Lime Wool
- Steampunk Style Moltres - Copper Ingot
- Yellow Hat Style Pichu Line - Yellow Wool
- Cheerleader Style Plusle - Pink Wool
- Uva Style Smoliv - Sweet Berries
- Chef Style Snorlax - White Wool
- Eternal Style Tinkaton - Wither Rose
- Chef Style Typhlosion - White Wool
- Dignified Style Wooper - Emerald
- Steampunk Style Zapdos - Copper Ingot

**Winter Bundle 2025**

Every cosmetic in this bundle is activated through putting a Snow Block in the cosmetic slot, and has an alternative color activated/planned through a Powder Snow Bucket unless stated otherwise:

- Ice Dragon Style Gardevoir 
- Ice Raider Style Golisopod
- Winter Style Greninja
- Boundary Style Mewtwo
- Aurora Style Ninetales - Star Sweet / Nether Star
- Holiday Style Ninetales
- Aurora Style Umbreon 
- Holiday Style Vulpix 
- Skier Style Weavile

**United Festival**

- Festival Style Throh - Black Belt
- Festival Style Sawk - Black Belt
- Captain Style Cinderace - Black Wool
- Steampunk Style Ho-oh - Gold Ingot
- Ghost Style Zoroark - Spell Tag

**Valentine's Bundle 2026**

Every cosmetic in this bundle is activated through putting a Love Sweet in the cosmetic slot:

- Valentines Style Eevee
- Valentines Style Vaporeon
- Valentines Style Jolteon
- Valentines Style Flareon
- Valentines Style Roserade

**Easter Bundle 2026**

Every cosmetic in this bundle is activated through putting a Lucky Egg in the cosmetic slot:

- Easter Style Togepi Line
- Easter Style Buneary Line
- Easter Style Blissey

</details>

<details>
<summary>List of Available Trainer Cosmetics</summary>

## Armors (Download with the latest version of Cobblemon:Armory)

Command: /give @s cobblemonarmory:dp_{armor_piece}[cobblemonarmory:armor_set_id="morearmors:{armor_set_id}",minecraft:custom_model_data={custom_model_id}]
Recipes: Obtainable in Survival, recipes below:

- Decidueye Armor (ID = "decidueye", CMD = 7291-7294) (Leather pieces with Cobblemon Armory Smithing Template and Decidueye Feathers)
- Shiny Decidueye Armor (ID = "shiny_decidueye", CMD = 7295-7298} (Decidueye pieces with Cobblemon Armory Smithing Template and Shiny Stone)
- Greninja Armor (ID = "greninja", CMD = 6581-6584) (Leather pieces with Cobblemon Armory Smithing Template and Greninja Skin)
- Shiny Greninja Armor (ID = "shiny_greninja", CMD = 6585-6588) (Greninja pieces with Cobblemon Armory Smithing Template and Shiny Stone)

## Headwear

Command: /give @s carved_pumpkin[minecraft:custom_model_data=n], n is outlined below:
Recipes: Recipe Pack README or Wiki

- Alola Cap (1)
- Lucario Hood / Shiny (2/3)
- Mystical Mask (4)
- Baneful Fox Mask / Shiny (5/6)
- Umbreon Mask / Shiny (7/8)
- Mimikyu Mask / Shiny (9/10)
- Yellow Hat (11)
- Eevee Mask / Shiny (12/13)

</details>

## 🍲 **Miscellaneous**

All models, textures and other pack contents are created solely by Archaeusdev\
Special thanks to the Cobblemon Discord for guidance, and Zalno for inspo, go check out his addon [Styles upon Styles](https://modrinth.com/datapack/styles-upon-styles)!

**LICENSE**

CMC uses the [MIT license](https://opensource.org/license/mit) so you can freely distribute and copy it, I genuinely don't care if you credit me or not, but it is highly discouraged to use this addon in pay-to-win or crateslop. Up to you, though, John Serverowner.
